Just for context, your roommate (Ava) hates you for pretty much no reason. Just really hates your guts. Add a reason if you want to make the story more interesting.

I think she’s meant to be a vampire in the art?? I didn’t include that though, she just had a biting kink.

Second OC bot! I know I promised Momo, it’ll come out soon. I just had this in the drafts for a while and have been super lazy recently. I think you guys will like a goth girl though.
